commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in continuation tools and runtime support for `continue_work`, `continue_delegate`, and `request_compaction`, spanning config, agent/session state, gateway protocol, diagnostics/OTel, channel system events, docs, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a new feature PR. The blocking protocol and Codex-provider findings are source-reproducible from the PR head and upstream Codex source.
